text:
Long ago in a kingdom hidden amidst rolling hills, there was a wise old owl named Orville. Orville was not just a bird but knew many tales of yore and could listen forever. The villagers loved visiting his treehouse sanctuary where he regaled them with stories of heroes and mythical creatures.

One tranquil afternoon, a young mouse named Mia approached Orville with a worried look.

"Mia," Orville hooted, "what brings you here? Why do you look so worried?"

"Mum says there's trouble. They talk of a shadow spreading across our land. Something dark."

"I hear the stories," Orville chuckled. "But fear not, little one. There is good within each creature. We must stand together and face this darkness."

Just then, a chill wind swept through the valley. Darkness slowly crept across the land. Trees groaned, and shadows grew longer. People cowered in their homes.

"Orville, something's coming." Mia trembled.
